name: ableton-lyra
description: Lyra MCP Bridge — extends Producer Pal with lyra.* namespaces, WebSocket push, and project memory for Ableton Live 12.

tools.name: ppal-connect
tools.description: Connect to Ableton Live and initialize Producer Pal.

tools.name: ppal-read-live-set
tools.description: Read Live Set global settings, track/scene overview.

tools.name: ppal-read-track
tools.description: Read track settings, clips, and devices.

tools.name: ppal-read-clip
tools.description: Read clip settings, MIDI notes, and audio properties.

tools.name: ppal-create-clip
tools.description: Create MIDI or audio clip(s).

tools.name: ppal-update-clip
tools.description: Update clip(s), MIDI notes, and warp settings.

tools.name: ppal-update-track
tools.description: Update track(s).

tools.name: ppal-update-device
tools.description: Update device(s), chain(s), or drum pad(s).

tools.name: ppal-library
tools.description: Search Live's browser library by name, tags, kind, or source.

tools.name: ppal-playback
tools.description: Control playback of the arrangement and session scenes/clips.

tools.name: ppal-create-scene
tools.description: Create empty scene(s) or capture playing session clips.

tools.name: ppal-update-scene
tools.description: Update scene(s).

tools.name: ppal-live-api
tools.description: Direct access to the Ableton Live Object Model.

tools.name: ppal-select
tools.description: Navigate to and select items in Live.

tools.name: lyra.memory.read
tools.description: Read project memory, session history, user preferences.

tools.name: lyra.memory.write
tools.description: Write memory (requires user confirmation for destructive ops).

tools.name: lyra.arrangement.coach
tools.description: Analyze arrangement density, suggest consolidations.

tools.name: lyra.rack.librarian
tools.description: List, tag, and recall Macro Variations across all racks.

tools.name: lyra.dummy.build
tools.description: Generate dummy clip envelopes for a target parameter.

tools.name: lyra.comp.assist
tools.description: Monitor comping takes, suggest best sections.

tools.name: lyra.sample.similar
tools.description: Find similar samples using Live's built-in similarity engine.

tools.name: lyra.perform.audit
tools.description: Audit Follow Actions, launch modes, and scene probability.

tools.name: lyra.perform.sequencer
tools.description: Sequence Macro Variations or dummy clips in Arrangement.

tools.name: lyra.midi.coach
tools.description: Recommend MIDI Transformations for selected clips.

tools.name: lyra.midi.mutate
tools.description: Apply Max for Live MIDI Tools to generate or transform notes.

tools.name: lyra.latency.watchdog
tools.description: Scan device chain latency, recommend flatten targets.

tools.name: lyra.push.proxy
tools.description: Query and control Push 3 session state via OSC.
